## SaturatedPoolIndex type

An index by pool id for pool assets(prices, metadata categories, pool amounts etc) + total pool liquidity.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare type SaturatedPoolIndex<C extends Context<MS>, MS extends MetadataStorage> = {
    [poolId: number]: SaturatedPoolEntry<C, MS>;
};
```
**References:** [Context](./sdk.context.md)<!-- -->, [MetadataStorage](./sdk.metadatastorage.md)<!-- -->, [SaturatedPoolEntry](./sdk.saturatedpoolentry.md)
